# Hopewell Health Solutions

> Outpatient mental health & psychiatry across Connecticut for ages 4 and up. Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP), Partial Hospitalization (PHP), medication management, counseling, and advanced treatments including TMS, Spravato®, and EMDR. In person at six Connecticut locations (Glastonbury, South Glastonbury, West Hartford, East Hampton, Westbrook) and via telehealth across New England. Joint Commission accredited, 4.8★ across 368 Google reviews, serving Connecticut since 2013.

## Programs
- [Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP)](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/intensive-outpatient-program/)
- [Adult Co-Occurring IOP](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/adult-mental-health-iop/)
- [Teen & Tween IOP (ages 8–18)](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/teen-tween-iop/)
- [Women's Wellness IOP](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/womens-wellness-iop/)
- [Women's Trauma IOP](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/womens-trauma-iop/)
- [First Responder IOP](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/first-responder-iop/)
- [Substance Use IOP](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/substance-use-iop/)
- [Partial Hospitalization Program (PHP)](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/partial-hospitalization-program/)
- [Medication Management](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/medication-management/)
- [Counseling](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/programs/counseling/)

## Treatments
- [TMS Therapy](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/treatment-methods/tms/)
- [Spravato® (Esketamine)](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/treatment-methods/spravato/)
- [EMDR Therapy](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/treatment-methods/emdr/)
- [Therapeutic Treatments (ART, Gottman, mindfulness)](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/treatment-methods/therapeutic-treatments/)
- [Neuropsychological Testing](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/treatment-methods/neuropsychological-testing/)
- [ADHD Testing](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/treatment-methods/adhd-testing/)

## Conditions We Treat
- Substance Use Disorder, Alcohol Dependence, Drug Dependence, and Prescription Drug Dependence, plus depression, anxiety, trauma & PTSD, ADHD, OCD, bipolar disorder, and co-occurring disorders.

## Locations
- [All Connecticut Locations](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/locations/)
- Glastonbury — 33 Pratt St, Glastonbury, CT 06033
- Downtown Glastonbury — 300 Hebron Ave, Suite 203, Glastonbury, CT 06033
- South Glastonbury — 1420 Main St, Suite 124, Glastonbury, CT 06073
- West Hartford — 1216 Farmington Ave, Suite 301, West Hartford, CT 06107
- East Hampton — 151 E. High St, East Hampton, CT 06424
- Westbrook — 70 Essex Road, Westbrook, CT 06498

## Admissions
- [Rates & Insurance Coverage](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/rates-and-insurance-coverage/) — in-network with most major plans (Anthem, Aetna, Cigna, Optum, United, TRICARE and more)
- Phone: (860) 946-0447 · Email: hhs4help@gmail.com

## Resources
- [Blog](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/blog/) — clinician-written articles on mental health, treatment, and recovery
- [Free Handouts](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/handouts/) — parent and kid guides on anxiety, self-harm, and school refusal
- [Testimonials](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/testimonials/)
- [Our Team](https://www.hopewellhealthsolutions.com/about-us/team/) — 50+ licensed clinicians including doctoral psychologists
